name: agentcall
description: Phone numbers, SMS, voice calls, and AI voice calls for AI agents. Provision real numbers, send/receive texts, extract OTP codes, and make autonomous AI-powered phone calls.
author: agentcall

AGENTCALL_API_KEY.description: AgentCall API key (starts with ac_live_). Get one free at https://agentcall.co

billing.notice: Usage may incur charges. Free tier: 1 number, 10 SMS/mo, 5 call min/mo. Pro ($29/mo): unlimited numbers + usage-based pricing. See https://agentcall.co/#pricing

webhooks.notice: This skill can register webhook endpoints to receive real-time events (inbound SMS, OTP codes, call status, recordings). Webhooks require an HTTPS URL you control.
